title: Downtown development district; city of Donaldsonville
doc_html:
§2740.61.  Downtown development district; city of Donaldsonville

A historic district created and provided for by ordinance by the governing authority of the city of Donaldsonville shall be deemed to be and shall be recognized as a downtown development district.

Acts 2003, No. 842, §1; Acts 2011, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 20, §1, eff. June 12, 2011.
